Event: Roving Restaurant
Event Date: 08/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI323
Wolf's Bane

Once in a while for 3 sec., the unit throws clots of water at 2 random units every second. If a clot hits an allied unit, improved restoration is cast upon that unit. 2 random negative effects are removed from the target, and 15% health is restored to the target. All of the unit's stats are also increased by 15% for 4 sec. If a clot hits an enemy unit, improved withering is cast upon that unit. 2 random negative effects are removed from it, and all of its stats are reduced by 15% for 4 sec. That enemy unit also receives pure damage equal to 15% of its maximum health.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
